channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 18 Clemson beats No. 8 SMU 34-31 on last-second field goal for ACC title, berth in the CFP
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Cade Klubnik sat in his car for more than hour last Saturday crying following Clemson's loss to rival South Carolina, figuring his team's chances of reaching the College Football Playoff were over. My how things can change.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 1 Oregon outlasts No. 3 Penn State 45-37 for Big Ten title and 1st-round bye in playoffs
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — No. 1 Oregon managed to navigate all the potential pitfalls of a topsy-turvy college football season — even on a wild, wacky championship weekend. It just took the Ducks a little longer than expected to keep their biggest goals intact.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College Football Playoff preview: Clemson’s win sets up controversy with Alabama, SMU dueling for the final spot
item.description: Clemson put the College Football Playoff selection committee in a bad spot with its victory in the ACC championship game.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Arizona State makes College Football Playoff with 45-19 win over Iowa State in Big 12 title game
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Cam Skattebo and Arizona State are on quite a run in their Big 12 debut after being the preseason pick to finish at the bottom of the conference.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jokic's career high of 56 points comes during a low point for the Nuggets
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Nikola Jokic scored a career-high 56 points and had little to celebrate afterward. It happened in a loss — to a team that hadn't won since October. “I think today and the last couple games were really bad for us,” Jokic said. “We are really going in the wrong direction.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oregon, Penn State amass 55 points to set Big Ten title game 1st-half scoring record
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Oregon and Penn State piled up seven touchdowns, 537 yards, 28 first downs and 55 points in the Big Ten title game Saturday night. That was in the first half. The top-ranked Ducks headed into halftime with a 31-24 lead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wizards overcome career-high 56 by Jokic, snap 16-game skid with 122-113 win over the Nuggets
item.description: Jordan Poole scored 39 points, and the Washington Wizards overcame a career-high 56 by Nikola Jokic to beat the Denver Nuggets 122-113 and snap their 16-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 5 Georgia pulls off another overtime stunner, beating No. 2 Texas 22-19 for SEC title
item.description: Gunner Stockton, a little-known backup who had barely played in his Georgia career, came off the bench after an injury to Carson Beck and led the No. 5 Bulldogs to an improbable 22-19 overtime victory over No. 2 Texas in the Southeastern Conference championship game.
item.dc:creator: Paul Newberry, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: No. 16 Iowa State falls short in Big 12 title game again, this time with CFP at stake
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The stakes were higher for Iowa State, and the outcome was the same as the first for the Cyclones in their second trip to the Big 12 championship game. And the 112-year wait for a conference title will go on. No.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big 12's Yormark brings up hard choices for fans before sparsely attended title game
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — A little more than an hour before the Big 12 championship game kicked off in front of thousands of empty seats at the home of the Dallas Cowboys, Commissioner Brett Yormark brought up the conundrum faced by fans with the expanded postseason format.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Timothée Chalamet stuns fans with college football knowledge after criticism for being named ESPN guest picker
item.description: College Football fans were impressed by Hollywood actor Timothée Chalamet's knowledge of the sport during an appearance on ESPN's "College GameDay.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Norris takes pole for season-ending Abu Dhabi GP and Hamilton 18th in Mercedes farewell
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — McLaren's 26-year wait for a Formula 1 constructors' title could soon be over. Lewis Hamilton's time with Mercedes is set to end on a low.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn competes in a pair of downhills, another step on her comeback trail at the age of 40
item.description: COPPER MOUNTAIN, Colo. (AP) — For a pair of lower-level downhill events, this sure had plenty of Olympic medal-capturing and World Cup-winning ski racers.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ashton Jeanty lets his play do the talking for CFP-bound Boise State
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — After Ashton Jeanty streaked through the middle of UNLV’s defense on his way to a 75-yard touchdown run Friday night in the Mountain West Conference title game, he didn’t strike the Heisman pose. He didn’t even lobby for it after the game, instead letting his play do the talking.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 24 Army wins AAC championship in first attempt as Daily runs for 4 TDs in 35-14 win over Tulane
item.description: WEST POINT, N.Y. (AP) — The first conference championship celebration in Army history was underway at midfield and Bryson Daily made clear it would be a brief one. The Black Knights are going after another trophy next week. “Beat Navy,” Daily said.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pitcher Clay Holmes agrees to $38 million, 3-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Clay Holmes and the New York Mets have agreed to a $38 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: School district mired in transgender athlete controversy tells critics to blame lawmakers in CA and DC
item.description: Martin Luther King Jr. High School addressed an ongoing controversy over a transgender athlete and shifted blame to California state government and the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff makes MLW debut and makes major impact
item.description: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff made his Major League Wrestling debut on Thursday night, forming matches, confronting wrestlers and even firing someone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks receives send off before title game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Montrose High School’s Red Hawks are on the brink of history, entering the state championship game with a perfect record. For a team that hasn’t claimed a title in more than 70 years, the stakes couldn’t be higher.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bucs look to slow down Raiders' star edge rusher Maxx Crosby
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Bucs offensive line has done a solid job in protecting quarterback Baker Mayfield this season, but they're going to have their hands full this weekend when they face off against the Raiders. Las Vegas features one of the top pass rushers in the NFL in Maxx Crosby.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kuithe, Fano earn All-Big 12 first team honors
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite missing the last three games of the season, Utes tight end Brant Kuithe was named to the All-Big 12 First Team on Wednesday. Kuithe joins Utes offensive lineman Spencer Fano as the only Utes to earn first team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Westfall's live commitment, Akili to Oregon lead National Signing Day in San Diego
item.description: Silver Pigskin winner Akili Smith Jr went to the same program his father helped build, choosing Oregon Wednesday morning. His Silver Pigskin finalist teammate Aden Jackson is staying closer to home, going with UC Davis.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz commit 29 turnovers in 133-106 loss to OKC
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz lead the NBA in turnovers, and Tuesday night was their worst night yet. Utah committed a season-high 29 turnovers, 19 in the first half, as the Jazz go 0-4 in NBA Cup games with a 133-106 blowout loss at Oklahoma City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jill Ellis steps down from club president position with San Diego Wave FC
item.description: Jill Ellis, club president of the San Diego Wave FC, will be stepping down from her role with the team, the club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Sky, Angel Reese to open 2025 season against Indiana Fever, Caitlin Clark
item.description: Angel Reese and Caitlin Clark won't have to wait long to renew their rivalry during the next WNBA season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Texas safety Michael Taaffe honors Jake Ehlinger, 'feels sorry' for fan who made sign mocking death
item.description: Taaffe had strong, passionate comments regarding a sign held up by a fan in the crowd for ESPN's College Gameday, broadcasting from the Texas A&M campus the morning before the big game.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's season 'potentially' over after knee injury in 49ers' loss to Bills
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays respond to Pinellas commissioner's letter on stadium deal
item.description: The President of the Tampa Bay Rays has sent a response letter to the Pinellas County Board of County Commissioners following the letter to the baseball team last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC
